## Goal

Replace the flat startup quest scan with a curated top-level view — a small hand-maintained list of quests that earn their place on Coco's orientation board. Children are reachable via parent-id traversal when conversations go there, but don't clutter the default view. Success criterion: orientation becomes focus, not a bigger flat list. Failure mode (named upfront): hiding stale planning under tidy parents. The quest body captures observations, recommendations, the anti-hiding discipline, open questions, and the habits/cadences the change depends on.
